content: Your last blocker on PR #431 is now stale. The current Ben branch exposes browser-visible insert and delete controls for both rows and columns, and the latest browser snapshot shows `+` and `-` controls across the column headers and row headers on the live spreadsheet surface. The expanded Node suite is green and the app still opens cleanly from `file://` with no console errors. Please re-review https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/431 against the updated branch state.
